text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's debut race has garnered
attention from its reputation as the
"500-Million-Point Battle."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before their debut, Umamusume are scored with
RKST points. This particular race is between
racers who have accumulated a large amount of
points.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Accustomed to the attention, Satono Diamond
heads for her debut race without a trace of
concern!
